nasb.text: Then I heard something like the voice of a great multitude and like the sound of many waters and like the sound of mighty peals of thunder, saying, “Hallelujah! For the Lord our God, the Almighty, reigns.

esv.text: Then I heard what seemed to be the voice of a great multitude, like the roar of many waters and like the sound of mighty peals of thunder, crying out, “Hallelujah! For the Lord our God the Almighty reigns.

cnv.text: 我又聽見一個聲音，好像一大群人的聲音，像眾水的聲音，又像大雷的聲音，說： “哈利路亞！ 因為主、我們全能的　神作王了！

ccb.text: 我听见有声音好像一大群人的呼喊声，又像洪涛，也像雷鸣，说：“哈利路亚！因为我们的主——全能的上帝已经执掌王权了。

csbs.text: 接着，我听见好像一大群人的声音，也像众水的声音，又像大雷鸣的声音，说： “哈利路亚！ 因为我们的主、神、全能者做王了！
